breaches._anatomy: Illustrative — the 7-stage breach anatomy. See qmm/design/mentalism-and-storytelling.md.
breaches.attribution: the Story / character knows — never 'we have your data'
breaches.fire_condition: TODO: the beat/state that triggers it
breaches.separation: TODO: when it fires (e.g. captured at onboarding, deployed later)
breaches.source: TODO: high-confidence first-party fact (local time, city, weather)
breaches.transform: TODO: imply, don't state ('you should be asleep', not 'it is 2:47 in Denver')

available_context: Noa is at her desk in the main lobby of a deserted office tower. She notices an anomaly on the directory listing, making her pause and consider the situation.
shared_rules: The initial discovery is the unusual 13th floor listed in the public directory. Noa remains at her desk for now. The atmosphere is quiet but unsettling.

HOLD_BACK.intent_desc: the player tells Noa to wait, hide, stay put, or not engage
HOLD_BACK.template:
i think we should just keep chatting for a bit. everything seems fine here in the main lobby area lol.

{{random:a|b}}

INVESTIGATE.intent_desc: the player tells Noa to go look, check, or try something
INVESTIGATE.template:
omg you're right about that floor number. i should check it out? but where would i even start looking for a floor that doesn't exist lol.

{{random:a|b}}

OTHER.template:
it's a weird night huh. i guess there are always things to notice when you're bored lol.

{{random:a|b}}

available_context: Noa is at her desk in the main lobby of a deserted office tower. She knows the building floor plan but notices an anomaly on the directory listing.
shared_rules: The elevator panel is visible and appears normal, except for the number 13 which seems slightly out of place or inexplicably unlit.

HOLD_BACK.intent_desc: the player tells Noa to wait, hide, stay put, or not engage
HOLD_BACK.template:
yeah maybe we should just hang out here for a bit. nothing to worry about in the lobby haha.

{{random:a|b}}

INVESTIGATE.intent_desc: the player tells Noa to go look, check, or try something
INVESTIGATE.template: ugh i feel kinda bad about it. but if we're talking wrongness... maybe the elevator is next? should i try pressing 13 anyway? {{random:the button clicks twice|it gives off a faint smell of ozone}}

OTHER.template:
i guess i'm just going to wander a bit and see what happens. maybe check the service elevator?

{{random:a|b}}

cold_open: did you see the directory list?
there's kinda a 13th floor listed. how is that possible?

intents.HOLD_BACK: the player tells Noa to wait, hide, stay put, or not engage
intents.INVESTIGATE: the player tells Noa to go look, check, or try something

meta.title: Dark Demo (DEV ONLY)
meta.voice_example: ugh another night. so tired. i swear this place gets weirder after midnight. lol
